title: ChatGPT launches publicly
summary: A broadly accessible conversational model brings frontier AI into mainstream public use.

title: GPT-4 is released
summary: A major multimodal frontier model raises expectations for reasoning, coding, and professional task performance.

title: UK AI Safety Summit convenes
summary: Governments and frontier labs coordinate around risks from advanced AI systems.

title: European Parliament approves the AI Act
summary: The EU moves toward a binding risk-based regulatory framework for AI deployment.

title: GPT-4o expands real-time multimodality
summary: Lower-latency speech, vision, and text interaction strengthens expectations for assistant-like systems.

title: Stargate infrastructure project announced
summary: A large AI infrastructure plan highlights the scale of expected frontier compute demand.

title: Paris AI Action Summit begins
summary: International policy discussion shifts toward AI action, governance, openness, and economic diffusion.
